policyAlert.summary: Verify PTE Academic exam fee and dates on the official booking portal before quoting. Coaching fee is separate. Never guarantee a score.

alert.title: Confirm institution acceptance
alert.body: PTE Academic acceptance varies by country and university. Confirm destination rules before enrollment — not all PR pathways accept PTE.

about.label: Description
about.value: Structured PTE Academic preparation with trainer-led classes, homework, and progress tracking.

about.label: Ideal for
about.value: Students targeting PTE 50–79 for study, work, or migration pathways accepting PTE Academic.

about.label: Delivery
about.value: Classroom or hybrid per branch schedule. Materials per program policy.

about.label: After course
about.value: Exam guidance, score tracking, retake recommendation, and handoff to admissions/visa team when target met.

eligibility.criterion: Diagnostic or prior score on file

redFlagsBanner: If attendance drops or mocks stay far below target, pause exam booking and reset the study plan.

redFlags.title: Unrealistic target
redFlags.description: Large gap expected in very short timeline.
redFlags.fix: Reset timeline or recommend appropriate program

redFlags.title: Chronic absenteeism
redFlags.fix: Counselor call, batch change, or pause

faqs.a: PTE Academic is for study/work abroad. PTE Core is for Canadian immigration (IRCC) — confirm which test the pathway requires.

faqs.q: Who pays the PTE exam fee?
faqs.a: Student pays Pearson directly on pearsonpte.com. Coaching fee is separate.
Often within 48 hours to 5 days — faster than many paper tests.
PTE Academic is accepted for many Australian skilled visas — verify current Home Affairs list.
Yes — including speaking into a microphone.

compliance: Never guarantee exam scores or bands
Separate coaching fee from exam registration fee
Signed enrollment agreement before batch start
Record diagnostic and mock scores on client file
proTips: Set target in writing at enrollment
Confirm correct test/module for student pathway
Book official exam only when mocks support readiness
postApproval: Collect official score report when released
Update client record for admissions / visa team
Plan retake or booster if below target

timeline.title: Exam booking, test day prep, score follow-up

staffNotes.author: Coaching team
staffNotes.text: Use this specimen for counselor training on PTE Academic.

dos: Keep exam fee separate on quotes
mistakes: Visa team not updated when target met

quiz.question: Counselors must never for PTE Academic:
quiz.explanation: Score guarantees are prohibited for all coaching programs.

quiz.question: PTE Academic coaching fee and official exam fee should be:
quiz.explanation: Coaching and exam fees must be quoted separately.

quiz.question: Before enrollment in PTE Academic, FLC recommends:
quiz.explanation: Diagnostic and target alignment are required before batch start.

quiz.question: Minimum attendance standard for PTE Academic is typically:
quiz.explanation: Review attendance when it drops below 80%.

quiz.question: PTE Academic is:
quiz.explanation: PTE Academic is computer-delivered.

quiz.question: PTE scores are typically valid for:
quiz.explanation: Two years from test date for most uses.

quiz.question: Enrollment agreement for PTE Academic should be signed:
quiz.explanation: Signed agreement before classes begin.

quiz.question: Before advising official exam booking for PTE Academic:
quiz.explanation: Readiness should be based on mock performance.

quiz.question: When attendance drops below 80% in PTE Academic:
quiz.explanation: Attendance issues require counselor follow-up.

quiz.question: Official score report for PTE Academic should be:
options: Logged on client file and shared with visa/admissions team
quiz.explanation: Score reports must be documented and handed off when relevant.

quiz.question: PTE Academic is accepted by IRCC for Canadian PR:
quiz.explanation: Verify current IRCC accepted tests — PTE acceptance has specific rules.

quiz.question: PTE coaching should separate:
options: Coaching fee from Pearson exam fee
quiz.explanation: Always quote coaching and exam fees separately.

quiz.question: PTE Speaking uses:
quiz.explanation: PTE is fully computer-based including speaking.

quiz.question: PTE results are usually available within:
quiz.explanation: PTE typically returns scores quickly.

quiz.question: A student with unrealistic target timeline for PTE Academic should:
quiz.explanation: Unrealistic timelines must be corrected before enrollment.

quiz.question: Sales promising a guaranteed band/score for PTE Academic is:
quiz.explanation: Never guarantee exam outcomes.

quiz.question: Retake planning for PTE Academic should be based on:
quiz.explanation: Retakes need structured gap analysis.

quiz.question: Visa/admissions team handoff for PTE Academic happens when:
options: Target met and official report available
quiz.explanation: Hand off when target is met and documentation is on file.

quiz.question: Before PTE exam booking, FLC tracks:
options: Mocks and readiness against target score
quiz.explanation: Mock performance drives exam readiness.

quiz.question: Unrealistic PTE target (e.g. 90 from diagnostic 40 in 2 weeks) requires:
quiz.explanation: Reset expectations before enrollment.
